app.title: Velo
app.subtitle: Cash in / cash out
app.scanPrompt: Scan a Velo QR code to get started.

notFound.subtitle: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred in the application.

claim.missingId: This link is missing a claim ID.
claim.notFound: We couldn't find this claim. It may have expired or the link may be incorrect.
claim.loadError: Couldn't load this claim right now. Check your connection and try again.
claim.showToAgent: Show this to the cash agent.
claim.theyScanIt: They'll scan it to hand you your cash.
claim.fundsReleased: Funds were released to the provider.
claim.fundsReturned: Funds were returned to the sender.

merchant.title: Merchant Release Terminal
merchant.alignQR: Align the buyer's claim QR code within the frame to scan
merchant.missingIdOrSecret: Missing Claim ID or Secret key in QR payload
merchant.noQRFound: No valid QR code found in the uploaded image.

dashboard.loginDescription: Enter your Stellar address to view earnings
dashboard.title: Provider Dashboard

register.title: Register as a Provider
register.subtitle: Offer cash liquidity to nearby Velo users
register.successDescription: Your cash provision location is now active and ready in the table.
register.geolocationUnsupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser
register.invalidAddress: Please enter a valid Stellar public address (starts with G and is 56 characters long).
register.invalidLatitude: Latitude must be a valid number between -90 and 90.
register.invalidLongitude: Longitude must be a valid number between -180 and 180.
register.invalidRate: Exchange rate must be a reasonable number between 0.01 and 100.0.

status.title: Velo Status
status.subtitle: Live API and on-chain health, for transparency with users and partners. No trade details, balances, or addresses shown here.
